narrative:
Cols 29-A (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,189 registered voters, with 74.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 5.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.8%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 14.6 percentage points.
